summary: PostgreSQL Migration Verification - All requested features working correctly. Database migrated from MongoDB to PostgreSQL. Branding updated (BINTRONIX, no 'Made with Emergent' watermark). 2FA registration with real OTP via Resend. All pages tested successfully.

minor.note: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after data loads

backend: API root endpoint returns database: PostgreSQL ✅
Login with admin@startup.com / admin123 - returns access_token ✅
Dashboard stats show products, employees, shops, financial balances ✅
Accounts endpoint returns 3 accounts (cash, orange_money, bank) ✅
frontend: Login page - NO 'Made with Emergent' watermark ✅
Login page - BINTRONIX logo and badge visible ✅
Login page - demo credentials hint shown ✅
Login redirects to /dashboard after successful auth ✅
Register page - marketing ads on right panel ✅
Forgot password page - CEO photo displayed ✅
Forgot password page - Support BINTRONIX message ✅
Dashboard - stats cards showing correctly (Boutiques: 1, Orange Money: 750,000 GNF, Banque: 2,500,000 GNF, Cash: 500,000 GNF) ✅
Products page - lists 8 products with prices and categories ✅
Employees page - lists 4 employees with contract types and salaries ✅
Stock/Batches page - shows 8 lots with LOT numbers ✅
POS page - loads correctly with product cards ✅
Finance page - shows account balances and charts ✅

critical_code_review_comments: PostgreSQL migration successful - database_postgres.py provides MongoDB-compatible interface using JSONB columns
Branding correctly shows BINTRONIX logo and badge throughout the app
'Made with Emergent' watermark effectively hidden via CSS and JS removal scripts in index.html
2FA registration sends real OTP emails via Resend API
context_for_next_testing_agent: PostgreSQL migration verified working. All CRUD operations persist correctly. BINTRONIX branding displayed. 'Made with Emergent' watermark removed. 2FA registration with real OTP via Resend. All navigation working including POS which was fixed in previous iteration.

key_verifications.branding: BINTRONIX logo, badge, and 'Building the Future' tagline
key_verifications.auth_pages_background: Marketing ads with stock photos from Unsplash
key_verifications.2fa_enabled: Real OTP emails sent via Resend API
